sourcePrompt: A ZPU-4 quad anti-aircraft gun, an NVA towed mount about four and a half meters long. Four heavy machine-gun barrels with conical flash hiders sit clustered in a two-by-two block, elevated together skyward from a rotating central mount with a gunner's seat and two small shield plates, all riding a four-wheeled towing carriage with a hitch. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
